{{CargoOrgan
|name=Lionheart King
|type=Bionic
|rank=red
|id=10710
|idx=68
|description="High on a crag, the Lion King gazes upon the endless steppe — bloodied but unbowed. His kingdom stands vast, and his subjects watch in reverent silence." — Chronicles of the Griffon
|skill=Possessed by the Lionheart Soul, dealing DMG equal to 196% of ATK, and increase next RUSH DMG by 50%!
|hp=2110
|def=284
|atk=358
|rush=217
|gene1=Stonehide RES +4%
|gene2=Healing +12%
|gene3=Per 200 Lotteries drawn, {race} RUSH +7
Lotteries Drawn: 10000/10000
|gene4=Per 200 Lotteries drawn, {race} ATK +7
Lotteries Drawn: 10000/10000
|gene5=Per 200 Lotteries drawn, {race} DEF +7
Lotteries Drawn: 10000/10000
|gene6=Paralyze enemy by +4%
|gene7=Healing +12% (Awakened)
|}}
